backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining a Place type with geolocation and a Map-based storage system, exposing functions to initialize a sample karate club place and query all places sorted by name.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting three implemented features: displaying sport category photos, showing nearby academies with locations, and rendering generated images as static assets.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of frontend files describing the React components, hooks, and styling for the sports academy finder application.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining CSS custom properties for light and dark themes with a neutral color palette.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Sports Academy Finder application with a root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application component rendering a header, two sections (sports grid and academies list), and footer with gradient backgrounds and centered content.
frontend/src/components/AcademiesList.ts: Component fetching places from backend using useGetAllPlaces hook and rendering AcademyCard components in a responsive grid with loading skeletons and error handling.
frontend/src/components/AcademyCard.tsx: Card component displaying academy place information including lazy-loaded image, name, description, and formatted latitude/longitude coordinates with error fallback.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component displaying copyright year and attribution link to caffeine.ai with UTM tracking parameters based on hostname.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky header with logo, desktop navigation menu, and mobile sheet menu for Sports, Academies, and About sections.
frontend/src/components/SportCard.tsx: Card component displaying sport information with lazy-loaded image, name, and description, featuring hover animations and loading/error states.
frontend/src/components/SportsGrid.tsx: Grid component rendering five hardcoded sports (Basketball, Soccer, Tennis, Swimming, Volleyball) using SportCard components in a responsive layout.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook managing backend actor creation with Internet Identity authentication, returning authenticated or anonymous actor and invalidating dependent queries on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React hook and provider for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks for fetching all places and initializing places data using the backend actor, with automatic cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light/dark theme colors using OKLCH color space, plus base styles for smooth scrolling and responsive images.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the main App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending the default theme with custom colors (using OKLCH), animations, typography, and container query plugins for the design system.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking features for a Sports Academy Finder app, including requirements for sport category images and nearby academy location display with specific image dimension requirements.
